corrected_text:
Project Meeting Notes.

During the meeting, the new OCR feature was discussed. We also attempted to implement image preprocessing and aim to get client feedback by Friday.

Separately, remember to buy groceries: milk, eggs, and bread.

The To-do list includes fixing the styling bug on the main page and emailing John about the new requirements.

*   Buy groceries: milk, eggs, and bread

*   Email John about the new requirements
